current_entries.en_definition: (transitive, informal) To bribe, especially to deter oversight.
(intransitive) To become worthwhile; to produce a net benefit.
(transitive) To pay back (repay) the entirety of a loan, thereby effecting the release of a lien on (the thing that was financed).
A point; the sharp end or top of anything that terminates in a point; as, the peak, or front, of a cap.

examples.english: The excitement reached its peak.
examples.chinese: 兴奋到了极点。

current_entries.en_definition: The highest value reached by some quantity in a time period.
(geography) The top, or one of the tops, of a hill, mountain, or range, ending in a point.
(mathematics) A local maximum of a function, e.g. for sine waves, each point at which the value of y is at its maximum.
(informal) To look slyly, or with the eyes half closed, or through a crevice; to peep.

examples.english: Take a peek!
examples.chinese: 瞧瞧吧！

current_entries.en_definition: A tool, originally made from a feather but now usually a small tubular instrument, containing ink used to write or make marks.

examples.english: Do you have a pen on you?
examples.chinese: 你身上有铅笔吗？

current_entries.en_definition: A situation of serious and immediate danger.
Something that causes, contains, or presents danger.
Without end, eternal.

examples.english: Please give me your permanent address.
examples.chinese: 請給我你的永久地址。

current_entries.en_definition: Something apparently seen, heard, or sensed, but having no physical reality; an image that appears only in the mind; an illusion or delusion.
(historical) One of the four humors making up the body in ancient and mediaeval medicine; said to be cold and moist, and often identified with mucus. [from 13th c.]
Calmness of temperament, composure; also seen negatively, sluggishness, indifference. [from 16th c.]
Viscid mucus produced by the body, later especially mucus expelled from the bronchial passages by coughing. [from 14th c.]
A en given name.
(Greek god) A Titan, goddess of the moon, sister-wife of Coeus, and daughter of Uranus and Gaia.

A type of pastry that consists of an outer crust and a filling. (Savory pies are more popular in the UK and sweet pies are more popular in the US, so "pie" without qualification has different connotations in these dialects.)

examples.english: Have you ever eaten a banana pie?
examples.chinese: 你吃过香蕉派吗？

current_entries.en_definition: Any of various other, non-pastry dishes that maintain the general concept of a shell with a filling.
(figuratively) The whole of a wealth or resource, to be divided in parts.
(transitive) To hit in the face with a pie, either for comic effect or as a means of protest (see also pieing).
A part of a larger whole, usually in such a form that it is able to be separated from other parts.

examples.english: I want a piece of candy.
examples.chinese: 我想要一颗糖。

current_entries.en_definition: (biology) Any color in plant or animal cells.
A dry colorant, usually an insoluble powder.
(informal) A group or list of related items up for consideration, especially in some kind of selection process.
A mass formed in layers.

A vertical series of alternate disks of two dissimilar metals (especially copper and zinc), laid up with disks of cloth or paper moistened with acid water between them, for producing a current of electricity; a voltaic pile, or galvanic pile.
(heraldiccharge) One of the ordinaries or subordinaries having the form of a wedge, usually placed palewise, with the broadest end uppermost.
(transitive, often used with the preposition "up") To lay or throw into a pile or heap; to heap up; to collect into a mass; to accumulate
A needle without an eye (usually) made of drawn-out steel wire with one end sharpened and the other flattened or rounded into a head, used for fastening.
A slender object specially designed for use in a specific game or sport, such as skittles or bowling.
(electricity) Any of the individual connecting elements of a multipole electrical connector.
Any coniferous tree of the genus Pinus.

examples.english: There used to be a big pine tree in front of my house.
examples.chinese: 以前我家前面有棵大松树。

current_entries.en_definition: Any tree (usually coniferous) which resembles a member of this genus in some respect.
The wood of this tree.
(archaic) A painful longing.
(crime) A criminal who plunders at sea; commonly attacking merchant vessels, though often pillaging port towns.
(by extension) One who breaks intellectual property laws by reproducing protected works without permission.
(zodiac constellations) The Fish, a Greco-Roman constellation of the zodiac named for its presumed resemblance to a pair of fish

(astrology) The zodiac sign for the fish, supposed to be ruled by Neptune or Jupiter and to influence events occurring between February 20 and March 20 (tropical) or, less often, between March 15 and April 14 (sidereal).
(usually, _, uncountable) Urine. [from 14th c.]
The soft, spongy substance inside plant parts; specifically, the parenchyma in the centre of the roots and stems of many plants and trees.
The essential or vital part of something; the essence.
(often used with the, sometimes capitalized: the Plague) The bubonic plague, the pestilent disease caused by the virulent bacterium Yersinia pestis.
(pathology) An epidemic or pandemic caused by any pestilence, but specifically by the above disease.
(botany) An organism that is not an animal, especially an organism capable of photosynthesis. Typically a small or herbaceous organism of this kind, rather than a tree.

(botany) An organism of the kingdom Plantae. Now specifically, a living organism of the Embryophyta (land plants) or of the Chlorophyta (green algae), a eukaryote that includes double-membraned chloroplasts in its cells containing chlorophyll a and b, or any organism closely related to such an organism.
(ecology) Now specifically, a multicellular eukaryote that includes chloroplasts in its cells, which have a cell wall.
(ambitransitive) To place (a seed or plant) in soil or other substrate in order that it may live and grow.
A slightly curved but almost flat dish from which food is served or eaten.
Of a silvery blond color.
(intransitive) To act in a manner such that one has fun; to engage in activities expressly for the purpose of recreation or entertainment.

examples.english: I will play Sudoku then instead of continuing to bother you.
examples.chinese: 那我就不继续打扰你，玩數独游戏去了。

current_entries.en_definition: Agreeable; giving pleasure, cheer, enjoyment or gratification.
(Greek god) The "seven sisters", companions of Artemis and daughters of the Titan Atlas and the sea-nymph Pleione.
(astronomy) An open cluster of hot blue stars in the constellation Taurus, and the most easily visible such cluster from Earth.
(intransitive) To dive, leap or rush (into water or some liquid); to submerge oneself.

A program, especially an audio program, produced on a regular basis, delivered over the Internet in a compressed digital format and designed for playback on computers or portable devices such as mobile phones. [from early 21st c.]
(loosely, by extension) An individual episode of such a program.
Neat; eloquent; applicable; relevant.
(figuratively, of a look, word) Incisive; penetrating; piercing.
(figuratively, of a smell, taste) Piquant, pungent.
(mathematics, science) A zero-dimensional mathematical object representing a location in one or more dimensions; something considered to have position but no magnitude or direction. [from 14th c.]

examples.english: I want to emphasize this point in particular.
examples.chinese: 我想特别强调這一點。

current_entries.en_definition: To prod or jab with an object such as a finger or a stick. [from late 14th c.]
A lively dance originating in Bohemia.
The music for this dance.
A polling place (usually, as plural, polling places)
(in extended senses of the above) A mass of people, a mob or muster, considered as a head count.
A small and rather deep area of (usually) fresh water, as one supplied by a spring, or occurring in the course of a stream or river; a reservoir for water.

examples.english: You can use the hotel's swimming pool.
examples.chinese: 你可以使用旅馆的游泳池。

current_entries.en_definition: A small amount of liquid on a surface.
Any small body of standing or stagnant water; a puddle.
Able to be carried or easily moved.

examples.english: The device is portable.
examples.chinese: 设备是便携的。

current_entries.en_definition: (computing) Of software: able to be run on multiple hardware or operating systems.
(mathematics, of a number) Greater than zero. [from the 18th c.]

examples.english: I am positive that he is wrong.
examples.chinese: 我確定他是錯的。

current_entries.en_definition: (anatomy) Nearer the rear or hind end; nearer the caudal end of the body in quadrupeds or the dorsal end in bipeds.
(formal) Following in order or in time.
Situated at the rear; posterior.
A small bag usually closed with a drawstring.
(zoology) An organic pocket in which a marsupial carries its young.
A unit of mass equal to 16 avoirdupois ounces (= 453.592 g). Today this value is the most common meaning of "pound" as a unit of weight.

examples.english: We bought a pound of tea.
examples.chinese: 我們買了一磅的茶。

current_entries.en_definition: A unit of currency in various currency systems.
Any of various units of currency formerly used in the United States.
Repetition of an activity to improve a skill.

examples.english: You should practice playing the violin every day.
examples.chinese: 你應該每天練習拉小提琴。

current_entries.en_definition: (uncountable, especially, medicine, arts) The ongoing pursuit of a craft or profession, particularly in medicine or the fine arts.
The observance of religious duties that a church requires of its members.
A customary action, habit, or behaviour; a manner or routine.
Actual operation or experiment, in contrast to theory.
A practical joke or mischievous trick.
(Commonwealth) A crustacean, sometimes confused with shrimp.
Of high value or worth.

examples.english: The one resource more precious than any other was land.
examples.chinese: 唯一比无论什么资源都珍贵的是土地。

current_entries.en_definition: A condition that requires satisfaction before taking a course of action.
A medical illness, ailment, or adverse condition that exists before an insurance policy takes effect.
A prize or award.
(insurance) The amount to be paid for an insurance policy.
A warning of a future event; an omen.
An intuition of a future event; a presentiment.
Relating to now, for the time being; current.
Located in the immediate vicinity.
Relating to something a person is referring to in the very context, with a deictic use similar to the demonstrative adjective this.
The current moment or period of time.
To bring (someone) into the presence of (a person); to introduce formally. [from 14th c.]
(transitive) To put (something) forward in order for it to be seen; to show, exhibit. [from 14th c.]
A pressing; a force applied to a surface.

examples.english: The bridge crashed under the pressure.
examples.chinese: 桥在重压之下倒塌了。

current_entries.en_definition: A contrasting force or impulse of any kind.
(physics) The amount of force that is applied over a given area divided by the size of this area; force per unit area.
Pleasant to the sight or other senses; attractive, especially of women or children. [from 15th c.]

examples.english: This looks pretty interesting, Hiroshi says.
examples.chinese: “这看上去很有意思。”Hiroshi说道。

current_entries.en_definition: Of objects or things: nice-looking, appealing. [from 15th c.]
Somewhat, fairly, quite; sometimes also (by meiosis) very.
That which is or may be seized by animals to be devoured.
The cost required to gain possession of something.

examples.english: The price of gold varies from day to day.
examples.chinese: 金價每天都在變動。

current_entries.en_definition: The cost of an action or deed.
An indentation or small mark made with a pointed object. [from 10th c.]

examples.english: It's alright. This injection won't hurt. It will just prick a little.
examples.chinese: 没关系的，这个针不痛的，就只有一点点刺痛感。

current_entries.en_definition: The experience or feeling of being pierced or punctured by a small, sharp object. [from 13th c.]
(slang, derogatory) Someone (especially a male) who is unpleasant, rude or annoying. [from 16th c.]
(obsolete) The point on a target at which an archer aims; the mark; the pin.
(obsolete) A tiny particle; a small amount of something; a jot. [10th–18th c.]
A member of a primitive society.
A simple-minded person.
Belonging or pertaining to an individual person, group of people, or entity that is not the state.

examples.english: I would prefer to speak to you in private.
examples.chinese: 我想和你單獨談談。

current_entries.en_definition: Protected from view or disturbance by others; secluded; not publicly accessible.
Not publicly known or divulged; secret, confidential; (of a message) intended only for a specific person or group.
Not in governmental office or employment.
A soldier of the lowest rank in the army.
Likely or most likely to be true.
Likely to happen.
A quantity of something that is part of the whole amount or number.
Of or relating to property or ownership.
Created or manufactured exclusively by the owner or licensee of intellectual property rights, as with a patent or trade secret.
The region which the eye overlooks at one time; view; scene; outlook.
The act of looking forward; foresight; anticipation.
A hope; a hopeful.
The potential things that may come to pass, often favorable.
A formal objection, especially one by a group.
A collective gesture of disapproval; a demonstration.
(religion, music) A sacred song; a poetical composition for use in the praise or worship of God.
One of the hymns by David and others, collected into one book of the Old Testament, or a modern metrical version of such a hymn for public worship.
(transitive, intransitive) To apply a force to (an object) so that it comes toward the person or thing applying the force.

examples.english: A whistle blew, and the boat slowly began to pull out of port.
examples.chinese: 汽笛声响起，船开始慢慢地驶离港口。

current_entries.en_definition: (ambitransitive, chiefly, UK, Ireland, slang) To persuade (someone) to have sex with one.
(transitive) To remove or withdraw (something), especially from public circulation or availability.
(also, figurative, intransitive) To withdraw; especially of military forces; to retreat.
(literally, intransitive) To use coitus interruptus as a method of birth control.
(idiomatic, transitive) To remove something from a container.
A device for moving or compressing a liquid or gas.
(countable, US, slang) A worthless person, particularly: [from 1904]
The larger nonconformist social movement associated with punk rock and its fans.
A member of the punk social movement; usually anarchist and socially non-conformist although potentially either left-wing or right-wing.
Free of flaws or imperfections; unsullied.
Free of foreign material or pollutants.
Free of immoral behavior or qualities; clean.
(phonetics) Of a single, simple sound or tone; said of some vowels and the unaspirated consonants.
(of sound) Without harmonics or overtones; not harsh or discordant.
(Liverpool, Scottish) to a great extent or degree; extremely; exceedingly.
The end for which something is done, is made or exists.

examples.english: You made the mistake on purpose, didn't you?
examples.chinese: 你故意犯這個錯, 是嗎?

current_entries.en_definition: Resolution; determination.
(Sense of having a) meaning for existing or doing something.
(obsolete) The subject of discourse; the point at issue.
Anything that is difficult to understand or make sense of.

examples.english: Have you worked the puzzle out?
examples.chinese: 你解开谜团了吗？

current_entries.en_definition: A game for one or more people that is more or less difficult to work out or complete.
A riddle.
An ancient massive construction with a square or rectangular base and four triangular sides meeting in an apex, such as those built as tombs in Egypt or as bases for temples in Mesoamerica.

examples.english: There's a pyramid in Mexico bigger than any of those in Egypt.
examples.chinese: 在墨西哥有一座金字塔比在埃及的任何一座都大。

current_entries.en_definition: (geometry) A solid with triangular lateral faces and a polygonal (often square or rectangular) base.
A construction in the shape of a pyramid, usually with a square or rectangular base.
To drink or imbibe with vigour or relish; to drink copiously; to swallow in large draughts. [from mid-16th c.]
(historical) The 40-day period of isolation required after 1448 at Venice's lazaret to avoid renewed outbreaks of the bubonic plague and identical policies in other locations.
A period, instance, or state of isolation from the general public or from native livestock and flora enacted to prevent the spread of any contagious disease.
(figurative) A similar period, instance, or state of rigidly enforced or self-enforced detention or isolation.
(politics, figurative) A blockade of trade, suspension of diplomatic relations, or other action whereby one country seeks to isolate another.
(historical) A measure of length; originally a fourth part of an ell, now chiefly a fourth part of a yard. [from 14th c.]

examples.english: It happened at a quarter past eleven.
examples.chinese: 它發生在十一點一刻。

current_entries.en_definition: A division or section of a town or city, especially having a particular character of its own, or associated with a particular group etc. [from 16th c.]
A trembling shake.
A trembling of the voice, as in speaking or singing.
(music) an eighth note, drawn as a crotchet (quarter note) with a tail.
A female monarch.
A woman whose pre-eminence, power, or forcefulness is comparable to that of a queen.
(cards) A playing card with a depiction of a queen on it, generally ranking next below the king and above the jack in a given suit.
(chess) A chess piece that, under contemporary rules, is the most powerful, able to move any number of spaces horizontally, vertically, or diagonally.
A reproductive female insect in a hive, such as an ant, bee, termite or wasp.
A journey or effort in pursuit of a goal (often lengthy, ambitious, or fervent); a mission.

examples.english: Gulliver traveled in quest of adventure.
examples.chinese: 格列佛为寻求探险而旅行。

current_entries.en_definition: (obsolete) A group of people conducting a search or inquiry.
The metal mercury.
A pen made from a feather.
Something having the form of a quill, such as the fold or plain of a ruff, or (weaving) a spindle, or spool, upon which the thread for the woof is wound in a shuttle.
(by extension) Any pen.
(Egyptian mythology) The Egyptian god of the Sun.
(linguistics) In logographic writing systems such as the Chinese writing system, the portion of a character (if any) that provides an indication of its meaning, as opposed to phonetic.
(organic chemistry) A free radical.
A flat-bottomed craft able to float and drift on water, used for transport or as a waterborne platform.
(architecture) One of a series of sloped beams that extend from the ridge or hip to the downslope perimeter or eave, designed to support the roof deck and its associated loads.
A horizontal bar extending between supports and used for support or as a barrier; a railing.
The metal bar forming part of the track for a railroad.
A horizontal piece of wood that serves to separate sections of a door or window.
(zoology) A medium-sized rodent belonging to the genus Rattus.

examples.english: A cornered rat will bite a cat.
examples.chinese: 窮鼠囓狸。

current_entries.en_definition: The price of (an individual) thing; cost. [from 16th c.]
A set price or charge for all examples of a given case, commodity, service etc. [from 16th c.]
A wage calculated in relation to a unit of time.
A position on a scale.
An evaluation of status, especially of financial status.
A quantitative measure of the audience of a television program.
Any of the superorder Batoidea of marine fish with flat bodies, large wing-like fins, and whip-like tails.
(botany) A radiating part of a flower or plant; the marginal florets of a compound flower, such as an aster or a sunflower; one of the pedicels of an umbel or other circular flower cluster; radius.
(mathematics) A line extending indefinitely in one direction from a point.
(transitive, or, intransitive) To look at and interpret letters or other information that is written.

examples.english: You may have read this book already.
examples.chinese: 你可能已經看過這本書。

current_entries.en_definition: A bundle, package, or quantity of paper, nowadays usually containing 500 sheets.
(transitive) To diminish or lessen something
The act of receiving, or the fact of having been received.
(in the plural) A quantity or amount received; takings.
A written acknowledgment that a specified article or sum of money has been received.
(obsolete) A receptacle.
(obsolete) Capability of receiving; capacity.
(obsolete) A recess; a retired place.
A temporary stoppage of an activity; a break, a pause.
(government) A period of time when the proceedings of a committee, court of law, parliament, or other official body are temporarily suspended.
An act of retiring or withdrawing from public life, society, etc.; also, an act of living in retirement or seclusion, or a period of such retirement or seclusion.
(Australia, Britain, North America, Philippines, education) A time away from studying during the school day for a meal or recreation.
(with the) An international humanitarian organization that cares for the wounded, sick, and homeless.
(with the) The symbol of this organization.
An unincorporated community in Kentucky.
A town in North Carolina.
To wind on a reel.
To walk shakily or unsteadily; to stagger; move as if drunk or not in control of oneself.
(military) A unit of armed troops under the command of an officer, and consisting of several smaller units. [from 16th c.]

A certificate issued by the collector of customs of a port or district to the owner of a vessel, containing the description of a vessel, its name, ownership, and other material facts. It is kept on board the vessel, to be used as evidence of nationality or as a muniment of title.
(computing) A small unit of very fast memory that is directly accessible to the central processing unit, and is mostly used to store inputs, outputs, or intermediate results of computations.
Having a constant pattern; showing evenness of form or appearance. [from 15th c.]
Demonstrating a consistent set of rules; showing order, evenness of operation or occurrence. [from 16th c.]
Happening at constant (especially short) intervals. [from 17th c.]
(grammar, of a verb, plural, etc) Following a set or common pattern; according to the normal rules of a given language. [from 17th c.]
(chiefly, US) Having the expected characteristics or appearances; normal, ordinary, standard. [from 17th c.]
(botany, zoology) Having all the parts of the same kind alike in size and shape.
The act of regulating or the condition of being regulated.
A law or administrative rule, issued by an organization, used to guide or prescribe the conduct of members of that organization.
(European Union law) A form of legislative act which is self-effecting, and requires no further intervention by the Member States to become law.
The exercise of sovereign power.
The period during which a monarch rules.
A part or parts remaining after some has/have been removed or already occurred.

(mathematics) The amount left over after subtracting the divisor as many times as possible from the dividend without producing a negative result. If n (dividend) and d (divisor) are integers, then n can always be expressed in the form n = dq + r, where q (quotient) and r (remainder) are also integers and 0 ≤ r < d.
An agreement to meet at a certain place and time.
(transitive) To cancel, invalidate, annul.
To recall; to summon (a person) again; to bring (a person) back from exile or banishment.
To suppress; to repel.
Delayed; delayed in development, hindered; impeded. [from 17th c.]
(psychology, sometimes, offensive, dated) Having mental retardation; mentally deficient or underdeveloped.
(colloquial, derogatory, offensive) Extremely stupid; obtuse [from 20th c.]
A supernatural being that returns from the dead; a zombie or ghost.
(Greek god) A Titan, the daughter of Uranus and Gaia, the mother of Demeter, Hades, Hera, Hestia, Poseidon, and Zeus.
(astronomy) Saturn V, one of the moons of Saturn.
(anatomy) Any of a series of long curved bones occurring in 12 pairs in humans and other animals and extending from the spine to or toward the sternum.
(by extension) A part or piece, similar to a rib, and serving to shape or support something.
A cut of meat enclosing one or more rib bones.
(aeronautics) Any of several transverse pieces that provide an aircraft wing with shape and strength.
(architectural element) A long, narrow, usually arched member projecting from the surface of a structure, especially such a member separating the webs of a vault
A moving disturbance, or undulation, in the surface of a fluid.
A long vehicle or craft propelled by a rocket engine; a missile or rocket-propelled spacecraft. [from 20th c.]
An engine operating similarly to the pyrotechnic, generating thrust by the expulsion of hot gases; a rocket engine. [from 20th c.]
Of or pertaining to Romance.
Of or pertaining to Romanticism.
Fantastic, unrealistic (of an idea etc.); fanciful, sentimental, impractical (of a person). [from 17th c.]
Having the qualities of romance (in the sense of something appealing deeply to the imagination); invoking on a powerfully sentimental idea of life; evocative, atmospheric. [from 17th c.]
Pertaining to an idealised form of love (originally, as might be felt by the heroes of a romance); conducive to romance; loving, affectionate. [from 18th c.]
A European bird, Corvus frugilegus, of the crow family.
(chess) A piece shaped like a castle tower, that can be moved only up, down, left or right (but not diagonally) or in castling.
A cheat or swindler; someone who betrays.
Thick strings, yarn, monofilaments, metal wires, or strands of other cordage that are twisted together to form a stronger line.
(computer science) A data structure resembling a string, using a concatenation tree in which each leaf represents a character.
A flower of the rose plant.

examples.english: The sun rose from the sea.
examples.chinese: 太陽從海上升起了。

current_entries.en_definition: Something resembling a rose flower.
(chiefly, UK, New Zealand, Ireland, Canada, Australia, and) A road junction at which traffic streams circularly around a central island.
(chiefly, British) A horizontal wheel which rotates around a central axis when pushed and on which children ride, often found in parks as a children's play apparatus.
A fairground carousel.
A set piece of an entertainer's act.
(slang, of a draft/check) Not covered by funds on account.
Pliable material derived from the sap of the rubber tree; a hydrocarbon biopolymer of isoprene.
Natural rubber or any of various synthetic materials with similar properties as natural rubber.
(countable, North America, slang) A condom, especially an external condom.
(countable, baseball) The rectangular pad on the pitcher's mound from which the pitcher must pitch.
(uncountable, slang) Tires, particularly racing tires.
(by extension, chiefly, Commonwealth) Nonsense.

examples.english: They looked at the rubbish, then they looked at each other.
examples.chinese: 他們看了看那堆垃圾，再互相望了一眼。

current_entries.en_definition: A title of a category or a class.
(education) A set of scoring criteria for evaluating student work and for giving feedback.
A en given name.
(rare) A en given name.
(uncountable, printing, UK, dated) The size of type between pearl and nonpareil, standardized as 5½-point.
(intransitive) To make a low, heavy, continuous sound.
(slang, intransitive) To fight; to brawl.
Unfinished or roughly finished.
(book of the bible) A book of the Old Testament and the Hebrew Tanakh.

examples.english: Tom is engaged to Ruth.
examples.chinese: 湯姆和露絲訂婚了。

current_entries.en_definition: A en given name.
(British spelling, Canadian spelling) A light sword with a curved blade, sharp along the front edge, part of the back edge, and at the point.
(British spelling, Canadian spelling, fencing) A modern fencing sword modeled after the sabre.
(zodiac constellations) A constellation of the zodiac supposedly shaped like a centaur who is an archer. It contains the stars Kaus Australis and Nunki.
(astrology) The zodiac sign for the archer, ruled by Jupiter and covering November 23 - December 21 (tropical astrology) or December 16 - January 14 (sidereal astrology).
(nautical) A piece of fabric attached to a boat and arranged such that it causes the wind to drive the boat along. The sail may be attached to the boat via a combination of mast, spars and ropes.
(religion, generally) A deceased person whom a church or another religious group has officially recognised as especially holy or godly; one eminent for piety and virtue.
(Mormonism, specifically) Alternative letter-case form of Saint (“a Mormon, a Latter-day Saint”).
(figuratively, by extension) A person with similarly overwhelming positive qualities; one who does good.
(transitive, of discarded goods) To put to use.
A city, the administrative center of Samara Oblast, Russia, the sixth-largest in the country by population.
A tributary of the Volga in Russia, which meets the Volga at the city of the same name.
(biblical character) An Israelite judge in the Old Testament who performed feats of strength against the Philistines but was betrayed by Delilah his mistress.
An English surname derived from the given name, or from Samuel + son.
A clear deep blue variety of corundum, valued as a precious stone.
(countable, and, uncountable) A white, yellow, or purple variety of corundum, either clear or translucent.
(countable, and, uncountable) A deep blue colour.
(tincture) Azure, when blazoning by precious stones.
Any hummingbird in the genera Hylocharis and Chlorestes, as well as the rufous-throated sapphire, which is now in the genus Amazilia.
Any of the butterflies in the southern Asian lycaenid genus Heliophorus or the African lycaenid genus Iolaus.
(transitive) To fill to satisfaction; to satisfy.
(transitive) To satisfy to excess. To fill to satiety.
(intransitive) To stroll, or walk at a leisurely pace.
Tasty, attractive to the palate.
Salty and/or spicy, but not sweet.
(transitive) To tell, either verbally or in writing.

examples.english: I just don't know what to say.

current_entries.en_definition: Somewhat less than is needed in amplitude or extent.
(ergative) To (cause to) separate and go in different directions; to disperse.

examples.english: Don't scatter your things about.

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive, physics) To deflect (radiation or particles).
(ambitransitive) To rebuke angrily.
(transitive) To burn the surface of something so as to discolour it
(ergative) (To cause) to become scorched or singed
(weaponry, chiefly, historical) A whip, often made of leather and having multiple tails; a lash.
A person or thing regarded as an agent of divine punishment.
A source of persistent (and often widespread) pain and suffering or trouble, such as a cruel ruler, disease, pestilence, or war.
(intransitive) To ascend rocky terrain as a leisure activity.
(transitive) To struggle eagerly with others for something thrown upon the ground; to go down upon all fours to seize something; to catch rudely at what is desired.
A roll of paper or parchment; a writing formed into a roll.
(architectural element) An ornament formed of undulations giving off spirals or sprays, usually suggestive of plant form. Roman architectural ornament is largely of some scroll pattern.
(lutherie) The carved end of a violin, viola, cello or other stringed instrument, most commonly scroll-shaped but occasionally in the form of a human or animal head.
(ambitransitive, computing, GUI) To change one's view of data on a computer's display by moving in gradual increments, typically using an input device or touch screen.
A three-dimensional work of art created by shaping malleable objects and letting them harden or by chipping away pieces from a rock (sculpting).
More generally (since modernism), a three-dimensional work of art of any material or of mixed materials, whether sculpted, assembled, found, constructed or created using multiple techniques.
An instrument for mowing grass, grain, etc. by hand, composed of a long, curving blade with a sharp concave edge, fastened to a long handle called a snath. [before 10th century]
(historical) A scythe-shaped blade attached to ancient war chariots.
(cartomancy) The tenth Lenormand card.
A pinniped (Pinnipedia), particularly an earless seal (true seal) or eared seal.
A stamp used to impress a design on a soft substance such as wax.
A facsimile of an impression of such stamp that is a mark or symbol of an office or organisation.

A unit of time historically and commonly defined as a sixtieth of a minute which the International System of Units more precisely defines as the duration of 9,192,631,770 periods of radiation corresponding to the transition between two hyperfine levels of caesium-133 in a ground state at a temperature of absolute zero and at rest.

examples.english: Six pence per second, Bob reminds her.

current_entries.en_definition: Number-two; following after the first one with nothing between them. The ordinal number corresponding to the cardinal number two.

examples.english: Everyone deserves a second chance.

current_entries.en_definition: (of goods) Not new; previously owned and used by another.

current_entries.en_definition: Free from attack or danger; protected.
Free from the danger of theft; safe.
Free from anxiety or doubt; unafraid.
Firm and not likely to fail; stable.
Free from the risk of financial loss; reliable.

examples.english: If you see a mistake, then please correct it.

current_entries.en_definition: (ergative) To be sold.

current_entries.en_definition: (of a person) Easily offended, upset, or hurt.

A sentry, watch, or guard.
(computer science) A unique value recognised by a computer program for processing in a special way, or marking the end of a set of data.

Apart from (the rest); not connected to or attached to (anything else).

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To disunite from a group or mass; to disconnect.

A set of things next to each other in a set order; a series.

(card games) A meld consisting of three or more cards of successive ranks in the same suit, such as the four, five and six of hearts.
A literary or dramatic work, such as a radio or television programme, published in installments, often numbered and without a specified end.

current_entries.en_definition: A publication issued in successive parts, often numbered and with no predetermined end.
An act of being of assistance to someone.

(computing) A function that is provided by one program or machine for another.
(of a word or words) Long; polysyllabic.
(transitive) To move (people) to (a land or territory), so as to colonize it; to cause (people) to take residence in (a place).
Another category, especially of humans and especially based on sexuality or gender roles.

examples.chinese: 有百分之五十二的英國女性喜歡巧克力勝於性。

current_entries.en_definition: (obsolete, or, literary, uncountable, with "the") Women; the human female gender and those who belong to it.
Sexual activity, usually sexual intercourse unless preceded by a modifier. [from 1899]
Darkness where light, particularly sunlight, is blocked.

examples.english: It was so hot that I got into the shade and took a rest.
examples.chinese: 因為天氣很熱，所以我就走到陰涼的地方歇了一會兒。

current_entries.en_definition: (chiefly, literary, and, fantasy) A ghost or specter; a spirit.
Something that blocks light, particularly in a window.

A very small degree of a quantity, or variety of meaning
A cover around or above a light bulb, a lampshade.
A dark image projected onto a surface where light (or other radiation) is blocked by the shade of an object.
Relative darkness, especially as caused by the interruption of light; gloom; obscurity.
An uncomfortable or painful feeling due to recognition or consciousness of one's own impropriety or dishonor, or something being exposed that should have been kept private.

examples.english: I think death is preferable to shame.

current_entries.en_definition: Something to regret.
A portion of something, especially a portion given or allotted to someone.

current_entries.en_definition: (finance) A financial instrument that shows that one owns a part of a company that provides the benefit of limited liability.

To have or use in common.
Any fish in the genus Balantiocheilos.

current_entries.en_definition: Any fish in the genus Epalzeorhynchos.

current_entries.en_definition: A person who tends sheep, especially a grazing flock.

A change of workers, now specifically a set group of workers or period of working time.
(US) The gear mechanism in a motor vehicle.
(pejorative, intransitive, transitive) To promote or endorse in return for payment, especially dishonestly; sometimes extended sarcastically even to those not paid but strongly biased in favor.
The front part of the leg below the knee; the front edge of the shin bone: w:Shinbone on Wikipedia.Wikipedia

current_entries.en_definition: (psychology) A sudden or violent mental or emotional disturbance.
A sudden, heavy impact.
(figuratively) Something so surprising that it is stunning.

(footwear) A protective covering for the foot, with a bottom part composed of thick leather or plastic sole and often a thicker heel, and a softer upper part made of leather or synthetic material. Shoes generally do not extend above the ankle, as opposed to boots, which do.
Something resembling a shoe in form, position, or function, such as a brake shoe.
(from the perspective of one on a body of water) Land, usually near a port.
(informal) With verbs such as 'see' or 'hear', usually in the second person, used to point out something remarkable in either a good or bad way.

current_entries.en_definition: Will be likely to (become or do something); indicates a degree of possibility or probability that the stated thing will happen or be true in the future.

Ought to; expressing expectation.

current_entries.en_definition: Sharp or keen to the senses.

(ambitransitive, slang) have sex (with)

current_entries.en_definition: (weaving) A tool used to carry the woof back and forth between the warp threads on a loom.
The sliding thread holder in a sewing machine, which carries the lower thread through a loop of the upper thread, to make a lock stitch.
A transport service (such as a bus or train) that goes back and forth between two or more places.
The absence of any sound.

examples.english: Silence gives consent.

current_entries.en_definition: Refraining from speaking, for purposes of prayer or meditation; especially, a form of worship practiced by the Society of Friends (Quakers) during meetings.
Free from sound or noise; absolutely still; perfectly quiet.

examples.chinese: 因為不知道該說什麼, 他保持沉默。

current_entries.en_definition: Not speaking; indisposed to talk; speechless; mute; taciturn; not loquacious; not talkative.

Undiagnosed or undetected because of an absence of symptoms.
That which is silent; a time of silence.

The place where anything is fixed; situation; local position
A place fitted or chosen for any certain permanent use or occupation
(Internet) A website.
Region of a protein, a piece of DNA or RNA where chemical reactions take place.
A period during which one is seated for a specific purpose.
(intransitive) To use a skateboard.
(intransitive) To slide in an uncontrolled manner as in a car with the brakes applied too hard, the wheels sliding with limited spinning.
The outer protective layer of the body of any animal, including of a human.
The outer protective layer of the fruit of a plant.
The skin and fur of an individual animal used by humans for clothing, upholstery, etc.

examples.english: My physics teacher doesn't care if I skip classes.

The atmosphere above a given point, especially as visible from the surface of the Earth as the place where the sun, moon, stars, and clouds are seen.

current_entries.en_definition: With a descriptive word: the part of the sky which can be seen from a specific place or at a specific time; its climate, condition, etc.
(chiefly, literary, and, poetic, archaic) Usually preceded by the: the abode of God or the gods, angels, the souls of deceased people, etc.; heaven; also, powers emanating from heaven.
Hard aggregate remaining as a residue from blast furnaces, sometimes used as a surfacing material.

(originally, _, US, typography) The slash mark: the punctuation mark ⟨/⟩.

Not rough or harsh.

The main character in this story, who is in unbroken slumber under a magical spell, awaiting the kiss of a prince.

(intransitive) To pivot.
A thin, broad piece cut off.

examples.english: Will you have another slice of pie?

current_entries.en_definition: (British) A muddy or marshy area.
The skin shed by a snake or other reptile.
Dead skin on a sore or ulcer.
(transitive, slang) To cause to collapse; to hit hard; to render unconscious; to kill.
To soil; to sully; to contaminate; to disgrace.
To cover over; to disguise; to conceal; to pass over lightly or with little notice.
(transitive) To cover (a surface with a layer of some substance) by rubbing.

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To cause (something) to be a particular colour by covering with a substance.
(transitive) To attempt to remove (a substance) from a surface by rubbing.
The visible vapor/vapour, gases, and fine particles given off by burning or smoldering material.

examples.english: You had better not smoke while on duty.

The burning and inhalation of tobacco.

(informal) A kiss, especially that which is on the cheek.
Sexually vulgar material; something that is sexual in a dirty way; pornographic material.
Any of a range of fungi, mostly Ustilaginomycetes, that cause plant disease in grasses, including cereal crops; the disease so caused.
A light meal.

Any of the suborder Serpentes of legless reptile with long, thin bodies and fork-shaped tongues.

current_entries.en_definition: A female guinea pig.
(transitive) To extend through the distance between or across.
(transitive) To extend through (a time period).

A form of physical punishment in which a beating is applied to the buttocks.
An incident of such punishment, or such physical act in a non-punitive context, such as a birthday spanking.
A small particle of glowing matter, either molten or on fire, resulting from an electrical surge or excessive heat created by friction.
A short or small burst of electrical discharge.

A long stick with a sharp tip used as a weapon for throwing or thrusting, or anything used to make a thrusting motion.

Explicit or definite.

examples.english: Let's study a specific example.

The soul of a person or other creature.

examples.english: The spirit is willing, but the flesh is weak.

current_entries.en_definition: A supernatural being, often but not exclusively without physical form; ghost, fairy, angel.
The manner or style of something.
Enthusiasm.
(usually, in the plural) A volatile liquid, such as alcohol. The plural form spirits is a generic term for distilled alcoholic beverages.
To unite, as spars, timbers, rails, etc., by lapping the two ends together, or by applying a piece which laps upon the two ends, and then binding, or in any way making fast.
(figuratively) To unite as if splicing.
Any of various marine invertebrates of the phylum Porifera, that have a porous skeleton often of silica.

examples.english: A sponge absorbs water.
examples.chinese: 海绵吸水。

The porous material that synthetic washing sponges are made of.

examples.english: I didn't mean to spook you.
examples.chinese: 我不是故意吓唬你的。

current_entries.en_definition: (espionage, slang) An undercover agent, spy, or intelligence analyst.
A bright, directional light or lamp, especially one used to illuminate the focus or center of attention on a stage.
A tube or lip through which liquid or steam is poured or discharged.
A stream or discharge of liquid, typically with some degree of force.
The mixture of air and water thrown up from the blowhole of a whale.
The season of the year in temperate regions in which temperatures and daylight hours rise, and plants spring from the ground and into bloom and dormant animals spring to life.

(astronomy) The period from the moment of vernal equinox (around March 21 in the Northern Hemisphere) to the moment of the summer solstice (around June 21); the equivalent periods reckoned in other cultures and calendars.

An elastic mechanical part or device in any shape (e.g., flat, curved, coiled), made of flexible material (usually spring steel) that exerts force and attempts to spring back when bent, compressed, or stretched.
A rigid implement, often roughly y-shaped, that is fixed to one's heel for the purpose of prodding a horse. Often worn by, and emblematic of, the cowboy or the knight.

examples.english: More money for education will spur economic growth.
examples.chinese: 更多投資在教育的錢將會刺激經濟成長。

A pile of similar objects, each directly on top of the last.

examples.chinese: 湯姆把一疊信放在瑪麗桌上。

current_entries.en_definition: (computing, often with "the") A stack data structure stored in main memory that is manipulated during machine language procedure call related instructions.
No longer fresh, new, or interesting, in reference to ideas and immaterial things; clichéd, hackneyed, dated.

examples.english: The beer is stale.
examples.chinese: 啤酒沒氣了。

current_entries.en_definition: An indentation, imprint, or mark made by stamping.

examples.english: Put this stamp on the postcard and drop it in the mailbox.

current_entries.en_definition: A device for imprinting designs.
A small piece of paper bearing a design on one side and adhesive on the other, used to decorate letters or craft work.
(nutrition, countable) Carbohydrates, as with grain and potato based foods.
Any of various starch-like substances used as a laundry stiffener.
Interference on a broadcast signal caused by atmospheric disturbances; heard as crackles on radio, or seen as random specks on television.
A place where one performs a task or where one is on call to perform a task.

examples.english: How long does it take to get to the station?
examples.chinese: 去火车站要多久？

current_entries.en_definition: An artificial metal produced from iron, harder and more elastic than elemental iron; used figuratively as a symbol of hardness.
(of an, object) Rigid; hard to bend; inflexible.
(figurative, of, _, policies and rules and their application and enforcement) Inflexible; rigid.
(colloquial) Harsh, severe.
(slang) A cadaver; a dead person.
(pharmaceutical drug) A substance that acts to increase physiological or nervous activity in the body.
Something that promotes activity, interest, or enthusiasm.
A single pass of a needle in sewing; the loop or turn of the thread thus made.

examples.english: A stitch in time saves nine.
examples.chinese: 小洞及時補，免遭大洞苦。

current_entries.en_definition: A local sharp pain (anywhere); an acute pain, like the piercing of a needle.
A supply (especially a large one) of something kept for future use, specifically in case the cost of the item increases or if there a shortage.
An organ in animals that stores food in the process of digestion.

examples.english: The cancer has spread to her stomach.
examples.chinese: 癌細胞已經擴散到她的胃。

current_entries.en_definition: (architecture, chiefly, New York, New Jersey, Connecticut, also, Canada) The staircase and landing or porch leading to the entrance of a residence.
(biology) A particular variety of a microbe, virus, or other organism, usually a taxonomically infraspecific one.

examples.english: The rope broke under the strain.
examples.chinese: 繩子被拉斷了。

current_entries.en_definition: One of several parallel horizontal layers of material arranged one on top of another.
Any of the regions of the atmosphere, such as the stratosphere, that occur as layers.
A class of society composed of people with similar social, cultural, or economic status.
(geology) A layer of sedimentary rock having approximately the same composition throughout.
(ecology) A layer of vegetation, usually of similar height.
(computing) The transmission of digital audio or video, or the reception or playback of such data without first storing it.
A long, thin piece of land; any long, thin area.

examples.english: They played strip poker.
examples.chinese: 他们玩脱衣扑克.

current_entries.en_definition: A comic strip.
(golf) A single act of striking at the ball with a club; also, at matchplay, a shot deducted from a player's score at a hole as a result of a handicapping system.
(technology) A single movement or thrust of a reciprocating device (such as a piston or connecting rod); the length of this movement.
An act of hitting; a blow, a hit.

The movement of an oar or paddle through water: either the cycle of movement as a whole, or the propelling phase (as opposed to the return); the manner in which such movements are made; a rowing style.
A single movement of a paintbrush, chisel, pen, pencil, or similar implement; a line or mark made by such an implement.
To move one's hand or an object (such as a broom or brush) along (a surface) in one direction, touching it lightly; to caress.
